title: Kardomia jucunda
taxonomy: Kardomia jucunda is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is native to New Caledonia and is a part of the genus Kardomia. The classification of Kardomia jucunda places it in the kingdom Plantae, followed by the clade Angiosperms, clade Eudicots, clade Asterids, and finally the order Apiales. The family Apiaceae is commonly known as the carrot or parsley family. Kardomia jucunda is a member of the infrageneric group Kardomia in the family Apiaceae.
